legacyPieceCodes.subtitle: Redeem the latest Legacy Piece codes to claim free in-game rewards and boost your adventure.
legacyPieceCodes.intro: Players can use active codes to receive useful rewards such as shards, crates, chests, cash, and other progression items. Redeem codes regularly because Roblox games often rotate rewards during updates and community milestones.

legacyPieceBeginnerGuide.title: Legacy Piece Beginner Guide
legacyPieceBeginnerGuide.subtitle: Learn the basic controls, progression systems, and first goals for starting your pirate adventure.
legacyPieceBeginnerGuide.intro: New players should focus on learning combat, completing early quests, improving their character, and collecting useful abilities. Legacy Piece combines open-world exploration, fighting, and character progression inspired by the One Piece universe.

steps.title: Create Your Character
steps.description: Customize your character and begin your journey before entering the Legacy Piece world.

steps.title: Learn Basic Combat
steps.description: Practice basic attacks, dodging, movement, and ability controls to defeat enemies efficiently.

steps.title: Complete Early Quests
steps.description: Fight enemies and complete quests to gain experience and improve your character.

steps.title: Collect Abilities
steps.description: Discover Power Core Abilities and other combat options to create your preferred playstyle.

steps.title: Upgrade Your Build
steps.description: Improve your combat strength through stronger abilities, fighting styles, and progression systems.

quickTips: Redeem active Legacy Piece codes early for free shards and progression boosts.
Save rare drops and materials — they become useful once you unlock stronger abilities.
Movement and traversal tools make island exploration much faster as you progress.
Join the Legacy Piece community to catch new codes and update announcements quickly.

legacyPieceFruitsTierList.title: Legacy Piece Fruits Tier List
legacyPieceFruitsTierList.subtitle: Compare Legacy Piece fruits by combat potential, versatility, and usefulness during progression.
legacyPieceFruitsTierList.intro: Fruits provide unique abilities that change how players fight. This ranking focuses on general usefulness for combat and progression based on currently available fruit information.

fruits.name: Light
fruits.use: Strong option for players who value movement and ranged attacks in Legacy Piece.

fruits.name: Dragon
fruits.use: Late-game focused ability with strong combat potential for advanced Legacy Piece players.

fruits.name: Mochi
fruits.use: Useful for players who prefer offensive ability combinations.

fruits.name: Quake
fruits.use: Good choice for players seeking strong attacks against bosses.

fruits.name: Magma
fruits.use: Reliable option for consistent combat progression in Legacy Piece.

fruits.name: Ice
fruits.use: Useful for beginners learning ability combat in Legacy Piece.

fruits.name: Fire
fruits.use: Balanced early progression option for new players.

fruits.name: Dark
fruits.use: Provides another flexible fighting style for Legacy Piece players.

legacyPieceLevelingGuide.title: Legacy Piece Leveling Guide
legacyPieceLevelingGuide.subtitle: Follow a practical progression path to gain experience, unlock abilities, and become stronger.
legacyPieceLevelingGuide.intro: Leveling in Legacy Piece focuses on defeating enemies, completing quests, exploring islands, and improving combat abilities. Efficient progression comes from combining quest rewards with consistent combat training.

steps.title: Finish Starter Quests
steps.description: Complete early quests to gain experience and understand the basic Legacy Piece gameplay loop.

steps.title: Fight Suitable Enemies
steps.description: Battle enemies around your current strength level to maximize experience gains.

steps.title: Explore New Areas
steps.description: Travel through the Legacy Piece world and discover new locations, quests, and challenges.

steps.title: Collect Stronger Abilities
steps.description: Find and use abilities that match your preferred combat style in Legacy Piece.

steps.title: Prepare For Higher-Level Content
steps.description: Improve your character through continued combat, upgrades, and stronger builds.

legacyPieceAbilitiesGuide.title: Legacy Piece Abilities Guide
legacyPieceAbilitiesGuide.subtitle: Explore the abilities available in Legacy Piece and learn how they shape combat, exploration, and character progression.
legacyPieceAbilitiesGuide.intro: Abilities are a core part of combat in Legacy Piece, letting you customize your fighting style and improve your effectiveness against enemies. Understanding ability types and their uses helps you choose better strategies during battles.

items.name: Devil Fruit Abilities
items.description: Devil Fruits grant unique combat skills and powers that define your main playstyle, used for combat attacks, enemy damage, and unique fighting styles.

items.name: Sword Abilities
items.description: Sword techniques deliver powerful weapon moves and close-range attacks for melee combat, boss fights, and PvE battles.

items.name: Combat Skills
items.description: Basic and advanced combat moves combine with weapons and abilities to build combos and handle enemy encounters.

items.name: Haki
items.description: Haki strengthens your attacks, defense, and awareness, becoming essential for high-level fights and stronger enemies.

items.name: Mobility Skills
items.description: Movement abilities help you cross islands, dodge attacks, and reach hidden areas during exploration.

items.name: Ultimate Moves
items.description: Ultimate moves deliver high burst damage and turn difficult boss fights in your favor.

legacyPieceBossGuide.title: Legacy Piece Boss Guide
legacyPieceBossGuide.subtitle: Learn how to prepare for major boss encounters in Legacy Piece and understand their role in progression.
legacyPieceBossGuide.intro: Boss battles provide challenging combat encounters where you can test your builds, improve your skills, and earn progression rewards. Preparing with suitable abilities and equipment is important before taking on stronger enemies.

legacyPieceUpdateNews.title: Legacy Piece Update News
legacyPieceUpdateNews.subtitle: Follow game changes, new features, and important announcements from the Legacy Piece developers.
legacyPieceUpdateNews.intro: Legacy Piece receives updates that improve gameplay, add content, and adjust existing systems. This section organizes major changes so players can quickly understand what has changed.

updates.summary: New content, gameplay improvements, balancing changes, and feature adjustments are introduced through developer updates that keep Legacy Piece fresh.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Legacy Piece

questions.question: What is Legacy Piece?
questions.answer: Legacy Piece is a Roblox anime pirate RPG inspired by One Piece. Players explore islands, fight bosses, collect Devil Fruits, and progress through an open-world adventure on Roblox.

questions.question: Where can I play Legacy Piece?
questions.answer: You can play Legacy Piece directly on Roblox through the official game page. The game runs on PC, Mac, and mobile devices that support Roblox.

questions.question: How do I redeem Legacy Piece codes?
questions.answer: To redeem Legacy Piece codes, open the in-game menu, find the codes or Twitter icon, enter an active code, and confirm to claim free rewards such as shards, crates, and cash.

questions.question: What are fruits in Legacy Piece?
questions.answer: Fruits in Legacy Piece are special abilities that grant unique combat powers. Each fruit changes how you fight, and the Fruits Tier List helps you compare them by usefulness for progression.

questions.question: How often does Legacy Piece update?
questions.answer: Legacy Piece receives regular updates that add new fruits, bosses, islands, and balance changes. Active codes also rotate during major updates and community milestones.

questions.question: Is Legacy Piece free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. Legacy Piece is free to play on Roblox. Optional in-game purchases exist, but all core content, fruits, and abilities can be unlocked through regular gameplay.

cta.description: Join the Legacy Piece community on Discord for codes, guides, updates, and discussions!
